categories.label: Temporal
tooltips: Hour extracted from the session timestamp
Minute extracted from the session timestamp

categories.label: Context
tooltips: Day type: Work Day 1 (WD1), Critical Day (CD), Work Day 2 (WD2), Non-work Day (ND)
Session period: Morning or Afternoon
Participant profession: Health Care Professional (HP) or Special Police (SP)

categories.label: Demographics
tooltips: Age of the participant in years
Gender of the participant: Male or Female
Body Mass Index - calculated value

categories.label: Heart Rate
tooltips: Heart rate in beats per minute (BPM)
Baseline heart rate measured at rest
Normalized heart rate relative to baseline

categories.label: Physiological
tooltips: Heart rate variability signal in milliseconds, measured with Polar on the wrist
Cadence in cycles per minute (CPM), measured with Polar on the wrist
Movement speed in km/h, measured with Polar on the wrist
Parasympathetic Nervous System index - measures relaxation (rest & digest). Calculated with KUBIOS.
Sympathetic Nervous System index - measures stress (fight or flight). Calculated with KUBIOS.
Baevskii Stress Index - calculated with KUBIOS. Correlated with SNSindex.

categories.label: Activity
tooltips: Activity label with manual intervention: Work, NonWork, or Driving

categories.label: Sleep & Physical Activity
tooltips: Sleep duration in hours from the previous night
Percentage of day spent in physical activity (Walking, Running, Biking)
Mean cadence during physical activities - indicates intensity level

categories.label: NASA-TLX Workload
tooltips: Mental Demand: Perception of daily mental load. Score range 1-20.
Physical Demand: Perception of daily physical exertion. Score range 1-20.
Temporal Demand: Perception of daily time pressure. Score range 1-20.
Performance: Perception of success in executing daily tasks. Score range 1-20.
Effort: Perceived amount of work expended to achieve daily performance. Score range 1-20.
Frustration: Perceived level of irritation in performing daily tasks. Score range 1-20.

categories.label: Big Five Personality
tooltips: Level of outgoing nature of the participant. Score range 2-10.
Level of friendliness of the participant. Score range 2-10.
Level of organized nature of the participant. Score range 2-10.
Level of nervousness of the participant. Score range 2-10.
Level of curiosity of the participant. Score range 2-10.
